dogs.title: Fertilization
dogs.description: Sperm reaches the eggs and fertilization occurs. Embryos begin forming.

dogs.title: Cell Division
dogs.description: Fertilized eggs divide and travel to the uterus for implantation.

dogs.title: Implantation
dogs.description: Embryos implant into the uterine wall. Hormonal changes begin.

dogs.title: Development Begins
dogs.description: Spinal cords develop. Facial features start forming. Vet can confirm pregnancy via ultrasound.

dogs.title: Organ Formation
dogs.description: Organs develop rapidly. Toes, claws, and whiskers form. Gender can be determined.

dogs.title: Rapid Growth
dogs.description: Puppies grow quickly. Coat color develops. Mother's belly becomes noticeably larger.

dogs.title: Puppies Nearly Formed
dogs.description: Puppies are nearly fully formed. They move into birthing position.

dogs.title: Pre-Labor
dogs.description: Milk production begins. Nesting behavior starts. Puppies can be born any day.

dogs.title: Birth
dogs.description: Labor and delivery. Average litter size varies by breed (1-12 puppies).
tips: Contact vet if labor stalls over 2 hours

cats.title: Fertilization
cats.description: Mating triggers ovulation in cats. Fertilization occurs within 24 hours.
tips: Cats can mate with multiple males in one cycle

cats.title: Implantation
cats.description: Embryos travel to the uterus and implant. Early development begins.

cats.title: Early Development
cats.description: Nipples become pink and enlarged (pinking up). Morning sickness may occur.

cats.title: Growth Phase
cats.description: Kittens are developing rapidly. Mother's belly starts to swell.
tips: Switch to kitten food for extra nutrition

cats.title: Organ Development
cats.description: All major organs forming. Kittens develop their nervous systems.

cats.title: Rapid Growth
cats.description: Kittens grow quickly. Mother eats significantly more. Movement may be felt.

cats.title: Near Full Term
cats.description: Kittens are nearly fully formed. Mother begins nesting.

cats.title: Pre-Labor
cats.description: Milk production begins. Queen becomes restless. Birth imminent.

cats.title: Birth
cats.description: Most cats deliver between day 63-67. Kittens arrive 15-30 minutes apart.
